Name: 4FACTORS Palestinian Levantine Q&A Sample
Description: Native-written Palestinian Levantine conversational question-answer pairs (50) with English glosses and domain labels; written by a first-language speaker and reviewed line-by-line. No scraping, machine translation, or synthetic generation.
Abstract: A public demonstration sample of 50 native-written question-answer pairs in spoken Palestinian Levantine Arabic, each with an English gloss and a domain label. Written from scratch by a first-language Palestinian speaker and reviewed line-by-line against a checklist; both pre- and post-review file versions are retained for auditable provenance. No scraping, no machine translation, no synthetic generation. Larger sets and other Arabic varieties are available on commission with full IP transfer.
